texto: Jesus taught in parables for a reason.
explicacao: Citação de Stuart Connelly sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Jesus taught in parables for a reason.” articula reflexao, jesus, parables em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como parables.

frase_original: Jesus taught in parables for a reason.

texto: I took a breath. Pictured the bed waiting for me upstairs. Then retreated to the lobbybar alone and ordered an ice-cold gin martini, a small signal to myself that my work was done. I held the glass, its inverted construction an insult to gravity and the order of things. Just like our Movement, from the outside the balance of power seems all wrong. But hold a martini glass in your hand and you know instinctively that it is just right.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Stuart Connelly: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a trabalho. O trecho “I took a breath. Pictured the bed waiting for me upstairs. Then retreated to the lobbybar alone a…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que trabalho, alcohol, vida pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e vida.

frase_original: I took a breath. Pictured the bed waiting for me upstairs. Then retreated to the lobbybar alone and ordered an ice-cold gin martini, a small signal to myself that my work was done. I held the glass, its inverted construction an insult to gravity and the order of things. Just like our Movement, from the outside the balance of power seems all wrong. But hold a martini glass in your hand and you know instinctively that it is just right.
